title: drilldown/tableview for Count widget
excerpt: I’d love to be able to click on a Count Widget to see the matching/filtered items in a drill down or table view just like I can for a bar within a Chart Widget.

posts.author: mark.christiansen (Mark Christiansen)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to be able to click on a Count Widget to see the matching/filtered items in a drill down or table view just like I can for a bar within a Chart Widget.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team would love this functionality as well, it exists in the chart widget and is very helpful, but we recently noticed the drill down is not an option for the count widget.
An example of this is we have a dashboard that displays the number of blocked items, it would be helpful to click on that and see all the items that are blocked especially for a manager who may be able to help unblock them.
